prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA111 1.8T (CDAB) 16V turbocharged** (found in the VW Golf Mk6 GTI) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger**, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a **Bosch 0227.100.211 750cc/min high-flow fuel injectors** for a target of 280 HP at 1.5 bar boost on 98 RON fuel. The stock **MQB-based 02Q 6-speed manual transmission** will be reinforced with a **Peloquin LSD differential** and a **South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch** to handle the increased torque.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system** by **Supersprint** with a **200-cell catalytic converter** and a **resonated center section** to reduce drone while maintaining aggressive tone. The downpipe will feature a **V-band flange** for easy turbo upgrades and a **flex section** to prevent cracking under engine movement. Pair this with a **custom-mapped **ECU Master EMU Black** standalone ECU** with **individual cylinder trims**, **launch control**, and **flex-fuel compatibility** for E85 blends.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** (adjustable compression, rebound, and ride height) paired with **H&R 25mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars** to reduce body roll. The stock **Fox Sport subframe** will be reinforced with **034 Motorsport subframe collars** and **polyurethane bushings** to eliminate flex. Braking will be upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (from the VW Polo R WRC) with **330mm slotted rotors** up front and **280mm solid rotors** in the rear, paired with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified to fit the Fox Sport’s unique chassis) with **custom carbon fiber fenders**, **extended rocker panels**, and a **ducktail spoiler** for aggressive stance and aero balance. The kit will be finished in **PPG ‘Lime Squeeze’ (custom mixed to match VW’s ‘Tornado Red’ undertones)** with a **matt clear coat** for a stealthy yet aggressive look.

**OEM+ interior overhaul** featuring **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (retrimmed in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts** and **red contrast stitching**), a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (320mm, suede-wrapped), and a **custom aluminum shift knob** (modeled after the VW Polo R WRC). The dashboard will be wrapped in **3M Carbon Fiber Vinyl** with **custom aluminum gauge pods** housing **Defi Advance BF gauges** (boost, oil temp, and wideband AFR).

**Custom aero package** including a **Voltex Type-3 front splitter** (modified for the Fox’s bumper) with **carbon fiber canards**, a **custom aluminum rear diffuser** (integrated with the Rocket Bunny kit), and **DTM-style side mirrors** (from the VW Scirocco R). Wheels will be **BBS LM-R 17x8.5 ET35** with **215/40/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires** for track-focused grip, finished with **gold hardware** and **custom center caps** featuring the VW Motorsport logo.
